description: Isolates the bug where conflicting import aliases within the same Go package cause type serialization corruption. A correct implementation will resolve types based on the import context of the defining file, not the package as a whole.

assertNodes.description: The expression should resolve correctly despite the conflicting alias in a sibling file.

assertOnSubExpression.description: The type of 'Item' must be resolved as 'models.Data', using the alias from 'service_a.go', not 'm_alt.Data' from 'service_b.go'.
Accessing '.Name' should succeed, resolving to a primitive string.
